name: obsidian-lexibridge
description: 本地优先的多词典源工具，支持离线英汉释义、在线增强与可选生词本同步。

scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
scripts.test: node scripts/test-markdown-generator.mjs && node scripts/test-ecdict-utils.mjs && node scripts/test-ecdict-service.mjs && node scripts/test-eudic-api.mjs && node scripts/test-youdao-provider.mjs && node scripts/test-sync-utils.mjs && node scripts/test-sync-service.mjs && node scripts/test-auto-link-utils.mjs && node scripts/test-vault-files.mjs && node scripts/test-batch-update-utils.mjs && node scripts/test-settings-data.mjs && node scripts/test-anki-utils.mjs && node scripts/check-mobile-compat.mjs
